meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Finish Your Projects (Student Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn how to debug with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to cross the finish line and build a professional dev portfolio.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle stems from getting stuck on blockers that kill momentum. By integrating AI-assisted debugging into your workflow, you offload the cognitive load of syntax errors and logic traps. Use Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for real-time execution to ship your project consistently.
content.intro:
The graveyard of abandoned GitHub repositories is paved with good intentions and unresolved stack traces. You start a project with boundless energy, only to hit an obscure dependency conflict or a cryptic logic bug that halts your progress for days. That friction isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of leverage.

Today, you stop being a student who gets stuck and start being an engineer who resolves. By leveraging AI-first debugging, you transform the most frustrating part of development into a high-speed feedback loop. We are moving beyond manual console logging and into intelligent, automated resolution.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Before fixing, you must define the scope of the error. Use AI to analyze the stack trace and identify the exact line causing the runtime crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this stack trace and identify the root cause of the crash, focusing on dependency conflicts.

steps.title: Automated Code Review
steps.description: Pass your current module to the AI to identify potential anti-patterns that might cause future issues.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a senior-level code review on this module. Highlight potential race conditions and suggest cleaner patterns.

steps.title: Interactive Debugging Session
steps.description: Use Claude Code to step through the execution logic while asking the AI to explain the state changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Walk me through the state lifecycle in this function. Where is the data being mutated incorrectly?

steps.title: Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Once a bug is fixed, generate a regression test to ensure that specific failure mode never returns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest unit test for this function that covers the specific edge case we just resolved.

steps.title: Documentation and Cleanup
steps.description: Clean up your debug logs and document the fix so your project remains professional and maintainable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Remove all debug console statements and update the README to reflect the recent logic fixes.

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your 'expected' vs 'actual' output; it reduces hallucination by 40%.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to maintain context across multiple files in a large project.
Treat AI suggestions as peer reviews, not final answers—always verify logic before merging.
When stuck, ask the AI to 'explain like I am a senior engineer' to get more technical, concise solutions.
Commit your code after every successful AI-debugged fix to maintain a clear 'green-light' history.
content.next_steps: Now that you have fixed your blocker, deploy your project to a staging environment and submit it to our community showcase for feedback.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the workflow, and the technical edge to finish what you start. Stop letting bugs dictate your potential. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
